title: More Menu
heading: Announcements
text:
| Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| CORRIGENDUM | Notice inviting e-tender for hiring of Maturi Eeco,CNG (White Colour)Vehicle and driver for use in the O/o the Collector of Excise,West Tripura District. | 01/08/2023 | 31/08/2023 | |
| District Level Road Safety Committee | Minute of District Level Road Safety meeting held on 18-08-2022, 03-11-2022 & 06-12-2022 | 29/10/2022 | 03/11/2022 | |
| Notification for the post of Assistant Public Prosecutor 3 post and Assistant Public Prosecutor 1 post at Agartala West Tripura . | Notification for the post of Assistant Public Prosecutor 3 post for the court of Judicial Magistrate 1st class and Assistant Public Prosecutor 1 post for the Executive Magistrate’s Court at Agartala West Tripura . | 09/09/2022 | 30/09/2022 | |
| The interview in respect of the candidates who have applied for the post of Assistant Public prosecutor in the court of judicial Magistrate 1st Class, Agartala and in the Court of Executive Magistrate at Agartala , West Tripura will be held on 28 th September , 2022 at 11 AM in the Conference Hall of office of the Dm and Collector ,West Tripura. | The interview in respect of the candidates who have applied for the post of Assistant Public prosecutor in the court of judicial Magistrate 1st Class, Agartala and in the Court of Executive Magistrate at Agartala , West Tripura will be held on 28 th September , 2022 at 11 AM in the Conference Hall of office of the Dm and Collector ,West Tripura. | 22/09/2022 | 30/09/2022 | |
